programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny and Baez race to find a missing girl who will die within 72 hours without her heart medication.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: When Danny resorts to asking his incarcerated archenemy, Victor Lugo (Nick Cordero), for help locating a dangerous criminal who escaped from prison, Lugo refuses to assist unless he's allowed to accompany them on the pursuit.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank goes head-to-head with a data-tracking company when they refuse to unlock the phone of a terrorist that may hold information regarding upcoming targets.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: When a series of drive-by murders occur after six wrongly convicted men are released from prison, Danny and Baez wonder if they were orchestrated by the men as an act of revenge in the eighth season finale.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny takes on a personal case involving a drug cartel member, Louis Delgado, who Danny believes is responsible for torching his house, and Erin is given a promotion in the DA's office but finds herself in a challenging situation.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Gormley looks to Danny and Baez for help tracking down a former NYPD detective he believes may be a threat to Frank's safety.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: While investigating a case involving a woman who shot her husband while she was drunk, Danny's instincts tell him there is more to the story.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: When New York City experiences a major blackout, cops scramble to contain the resulting chaos, and Frank uncovers some unpleasant truths about his department in the aftermath.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny and Baez investigate a murder attempt against a celebrated fertility doctor with a seemingly pristine reputation. Also, Eddie is called to intervene in a Reagan family matter involving Danny's boys.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Eddie and her new partner, Maya (Yasha Thompson), clash with Jamie on the job when they fail to intervene in a public dispute at a convenience store.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Things get personal for Danny when Luis Delgado (Lou Diamond Phillips), the drug cartel hitman responsible for torching his house, resurfaces. Also, an attack on an officer in the line of duty directly impacts a member of Frank's team.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Erin and Frank clash over new legislation from the district attorney's office that undermines Frank's policies. Also, Erin is at odds with Governor Mendez (David Zayas) over questionable sex-trafficking laws.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: When a video surfaces of cops being harassed by a group of people at a housing complex, Frank orders a raid to round up anyone with an outstanding warrant, against Garrett's (Gregory Jbara) advice.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: When a video surfaces of officers partaking in a clear case of entrapment, Frank focuses on finding the cop who leaked the video. Also, Eddie retaliates against a co-worker who is pranking Jamie.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ben helps Matthew Raine, a famous painter who has gone blind and now wallows in self-pity, discover a new purpose in life. However, Raine's employee Gavin has other ideas.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Determined to prove he can succeed at something without the help of his Pa, Hoss, and Adam, Joe sets out on his quest and wins a timber contract for Ponderosa timber, and later discovers that having a family to rely on can definitely be an asset.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: An Indian-hating officer, Colonel Edward J. Dunwoody, comes to the Ponderosa looking for army deserter Bill Winters, who is a good friend of the Cartwrights.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss is jailed for robbing the bank in Dutchman Flats, a town on the brink of economic collapse, even the sheriff knows he is innocent, but a lynch mob gathers and Hoss' fate is not good.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Clay Stafford signs on to work for the Cartwrights and shortly afterwards shoots and kills a man who accuses him of cheating at poker. The miners warn Clay to leave town, but it appears he killed in self-defense.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: When Hoss is responsible for causing a hung jury, Ben tells him, "a man is never wrong doing what he thinks is right", and Adam attempts to validate his brother's reasonable doubt.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Ponderosa becomes a war zone when it is invaded by a detachment of Mexican mercenaries under General Diaz.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss volunteers to pickup an injured neighbor's mail-order bride, but by the time they return, she has fallen in love with Hoss and a price is put on Hoss' head.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss decides to help out Wade Tyree and introduces him to Abigail and her daughter, Bonnie. Hoss hopes this will stop Wade's constant drinking.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: With a storm brewing, Adam takes refuge at a way station, run by cantankerous Jesse and his young grandaughter Marty, who yearns to see what exists away from the way station.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss helps Charlie and Will (Charlotte and Willomina), two young girls who just lost their father. They go on a journey to find their only nearby relative, Aunt Cloe.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss is seriously injured internally and Ben seeks help from the only doctor within 50 miles, who happens to be in prison for murder.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Adam's guitar-strumming friend, ranch hand Danny Morgan, is arrested on suspicion of murdering and robbing the Widow Baker.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Frank Medford, a figure from Ben's "wild, misspent youth", shows up in Virginia City, and though down on his luck, creates troubles for the Cartwrights by claiming to be a successful businessman.

programme.desc: Wanda gets a week of vacation and decides to spend it with the kids.

programme.title: Love Island

programme.desc: Love Island UK's Maura Higgins enters the villa to play a revealing game of "Face Facts" with the Islanders, where they learn what the nation really thinks of them; America's votes for their favorite girls and boys are revealed.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: The Islanders who are safe from America's vote choose one girl and one boy to dump from Fiji; Sarah Hyland returns as Casa Amor begins; the current couples are tested when they're split into two villas with sexy new singles.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: The Islanders welcome seven new single girls to the villa, while Casa Amor plays a game of "Truth or Dare" and gets to know the six new boys; new connections start to form and conversations get steamy.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Casa Amor takes on the villa in a game of "Shaking Things Up," where cocktails are made and passed down the line in each other's mouths; one boy is invited on a date but the girl who joins him is not who he is expecting to see.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Casa Amor and the villa play "Raunchy Races," a series of dares which sees the Islanders getting steamy and where the naughty behavior doesn't end with the game; Kassy is torn between staying in her current couple or starting something new.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: The Hideaways in the villa and Casa Amor open for two couples excited to spend time alone together; emotions run high in Casa Amor when the girls receive a video message from the villa.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: All the big stories and behind-the-scenes antics from the villa and Casa Amor, as narrator Iain Stirling reveals the very best unseen action from Week 4, including outtakes from when Maura Higgins played "Face Facts" with the Islanders.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Casa Amor ends; the Islanders must decide whether to stay loyal and maintain their current relationships or recouple with someone new; the girls confront the boys about what they saw in the video message.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Tensions reach a boiling point as the fallout from the recoupling leaves some Islanders torn over their decisions; friends rally around while Kay Kay and Kassy contemplate their relationships.

programme.title: Love Island

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS descubre un círculo secreto de peleas de perros, lo cual lleva a un miembro del equipo a hacer un movimiento inesperado.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Vance asigna a McGee, Torres y Bishop el cumplimiento de las medidas de protección frente al COVID en una cumbre de asuntos exteriores, donde descubren un vínculo con un caso de asesinato de otro equipo del NCIS.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: La evidencia del apuñalamiento de un sargento de la Marina lleva a Torres a conocer a su padre, Miguel (Steven Bauer), quien le abandonó cuando era un niño.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez se apresuran a encontrar a una niña desaparecida que morirá en 72 horas sin su medicación para el corazón.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando Danny pide ayuda a su archienemigo encarcelado, Victor Lugo (Nick Cordero), para localizar a un criminal peligroso que escapó de prisión, Lugo acepta colaborar solo si puede unirse a la búsqueda.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Frank se enfrenta a una empresa de rastreo de datos cuando se niegan a desbloquear el teléfono de un terrorista que podría tener información sobre próximos objetivos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: En el final de la octava temporada, tras una serie de tiroteos mortales después de que seis hombres injustamente condenados fueran liberados, Danny y Baez se preguntan si los asesinatos fueron parte de un plan de venganza de los exconvictos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC investiga un asesinato masivo en una empresa de seguridad de Internet en las cercanías de Charlottesville, pero las pistas revelan que no es un asesino en serie normal.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo UAC viaja a Idaho, donde un asesino en serie fija como objetivo a los sobrevivientes de la masacre de la secundaria Boise de hace 10 años.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC investiga los secuestros de niños cuyas madres presentan diversos problemas en St. Louis, Missouri. Por otra parte, Rossi se reencuentra con su primera mujer, que tiene impactantes noticias para él.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo viaja a California, donde en un bosque se han encontrado cuerpos ahogados. Mientras tanto, Rossi tiene que tomar una dura decisión con respecto a su exesposa.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS se sumerge en el competitivo mundo de los camiones de comida ambulante tras encontrar a un hombre congelado en la parte trasera de uno de ellos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS descubre un círculo secreto de peleas de perros, lo cual lleva a un miembro del equipo a hacer un movimiento inesperado.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Vance asigna a McGee, Torres y Bishop el cumplimiento de las medidas de protección frente al COVID en una cumbre de asuntos exteriores, donde descubren un vínculo con un caso de asesinato de otro equipo del NCIS.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers encounter an unusual situation where the victim and suspect have barricaded themselves inside the house. Officers respond to a domestic dispute at a nearby apartment complex. A man explains how his ex-girlfriend climbed into his window.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A knife wielding man hangs around the lot of a convenience store. An intoxicated man in speedos flees from the police after urinating in a parking lot. An officer responds to a domestic dispute after a man locks his girlfriend in the bathroom.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue a vehicle traveling up to 100mph on a local freeway. An officer is dispatched to a larceny in progress at a local convenience store. A man threatens an elderly woman at their residence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers use a police SUV and a taser to stop a fleeing man with a knife. A hit-and-run suspect crashes into a gas station. An unlicensed driver has warrants in Greene County, Missouri.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers apprehend an armed suspect, the cops are called when a man damages his neighbor's window, and deputies investigate a parking garage known for illegal activity.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An underaged spring breaker is caught with a 'blackout rage gallon' and issued a ticket. A zero-tolerance policy of no alcohol or glass containers on the beach is enforced in Pinellas County.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An innocent conversation turns into a high-speed motorcycle chase, a driver gets ratted out by his passengers, and a series of bad decisions land a young man in hot water.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young couple spends too much time arguing and not enough time paying attention to the road. An officer uses his surefire trick to catch someone in a lie. A chatty driver racks up a slew of charges in front of his own house.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers coordinate a prostitution sting. Officers pull over a vehicle with a missing license plate. Officers stop a woman driving a stolen vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Undercover officers set up a sting operation to nab people looking to buy drugs. A woman tries to conceal drugs in her mouth. Then a repeat offender who has a history of threatening officers with a tainted needle is arrested.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A DUI suspect attempts to flee from police, officers find a wanted man trespassing in someone's yard, and officers stop two people suspected of stealing a moped.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers encounter dancing tourists on the Vegas Strip. An uncooperative spring breaker finds herself in cuffs. Surfers and lifeguards rescue swimmers from a riptide. A beachgoer lies about his age.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young carjacking suspect in custody gets a tongue-lashing from his mom and aunt, a man terrorizing his mom gets tased, and police give chase to a familiar vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A runaway biker makes multiple clumsy attempts to slip away from deputies. A shady figure has a curious method of trying to get a drink of water. A young woman starts making unwise choices when her family leaves town.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A loitering suspect flees when approached by police, and a traffic stop leaves a woman concerned for the future of her marriage.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A DUI suspect with a suspended license claims he’s not drunk. Officers track an armed robber. An armed and dangerous suspect hides from officers in an apartment complex.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are called to a burglary at a warehouse housing expensive items. Police are called to the scene of a threatening man with a knife. Officers thwart an attempted suicide during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An unruly man gives deputies a hard time, witnesses call the cops when a well-dressed driver plows through multiple barricades, and a domestic call takes an unexpected turn.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect can’t stop huffing butane. Mistrust proves toxic after a dispute over slot machines. A puppy proves to be the magic charm with individuals who’ve hit a rough patch.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers conduct a routine traffic stop on a vehicle that ran a stop sign. Officers and residents systematically retrieve birds from a fireplace and release them outside. A police department conducts a drug-reversal-buy sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies are concerned when a fleeing man leaves a trail of illicit items. A young woman unwisely decides to hang out with a man she nicknamed 'Sketchy.' Some well-placed security cameras help reunite a man with his stolen bike.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A little rain doesn’t stop a determined quad driver from trying to outrun police. A deputy has doubts about a man’s professed distrust of banks. A man ignores obvious red flags when buying a moped and ends up paying the price.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A teenager who ran away from home tries running from the cops too. A man set a date to turn his life around, but deputies ask him to start earlier. A man found with hundreds of sunglasses claims he was going to give them away.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The passenger of a fleeing driver makes his own getaway, a motorcyclist in a high-speed pursuit narrowly misses a car, and police respond to a disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcyclist tries to escape on foot, a couple's synthetic marijuana use catches up with them, and an officer tries to get the real story behind a domestic disturbance.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A sibling reluctantly called authorities when his belligerent brother refused to leave his mother's home. Officers respond to a shoplifting call at a local grocery store. Officers investigate a suspicious vehicle parked at a local gas station.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers arrest a man suspected of robbery. A riot erupts at a juvenile party on the beach. Officers find an intoxicated man stuck on an iron fence.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs enter the world of rap music in order to investigate the deaths of three teenagers killed while working for rival rappers.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Solving the case of a wealthy defense attorney killed at her son's wedding is compromised when all of the evidence is stolen along with Nick's car.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The evidence in the case of a high-stakes gambler and ladies man murdered outside a casino after a night of revelry proves that appearances can be deceiving.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A man accused of murdering his wife and co-workers leads the CSIs on a wild chase through a busy Vegas casino.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team rallies around one of their own, who is shot in the line of duty and may not survive on the sixth season finale.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: While Grissom leads a group of college students on a tour of CSI, the dead speak while the CSIs investigate, each narrating their own case

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate first-hand the behind-the-scenes action of Cirque du Soleil in order to determine what may have contributed to a young dancer's untimely death.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom is fascinated when every detail of a miniature is identical to that of a real crime scene, and he goes about trying to solve the case using the clues provided.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When an innocent man is brutally attacked and beaten to death by what looks like a monster in a black cape, the CSIs are called to investigate, only to learn that a similar attack took place minutes later.

programme.title: CSI

programme.desc: Rosie y Alex han sido mejores amigos desde los 5 años, así que no podrían ser el uno para el otro... ¿o sí?

programme.title: Instructions Not Included
programme.desc: Valentin (Eugenio Derbez) is Acapulco’s resident playboy until his life gets turned upside down when a former fling leaves a baby girl on his doorstep.

programme.title: Amor a primera visa
programme.desc: Alejandro, un mariachi, y su mejor amigo, Canicas, aprovechan un encuentro casual como una oportunidad para hacer cambiar de opinión a la joven de la embajada, Rachel, que rechazó la solicitud de visa de su hija para visitar EE. UU.

programme.title: Juana Gallo
programme.desc: La verdadera historia de Angela Ramos una joven campesina que llegó a ser la cabeza de una guerrilla que lucho exitosa-mente contra las fuerzas federales del usurpador Victoriano Huerta. El pueblo la llamó por su fiereza “Juana Gallo”.

programme.title: Los siete magníficos
programme.desc: Hombres armados son contratados para proteger un pueblo mexicano de un grupo de bandidos en esta adaptación de “Seven Samurai” de Kurosawa.

programme.title: El regreso de los siete magnificos
programme.desc: Protagonizada por Yul Brynner y con un reparto estelar que incluye a Robert Fuller, Warren Oates y Claude Akins, este western de aventuras sigue a los siete magníficos hasta México, donde se enfrentarán al duelo de sus vidas.

programme.title: Vuelven los siete magníficos
programme.desc: Un noble pistolero (George Kennedy) contrata a una brigada formada por los hombres más peligrosos del oeste para liberar a un líder revolucionario de los campesinos de una importante prisión mexicana en este clásico del oeste.

programme.title: El desafío de los siete magníficos
programme.desc: El jefe de 'Los Siete Magníficos' es ahora el sheriff de una pequeña ciudad. Cuando su 'tranquilidad' es destruida por el asesinato de su esposa, acepta una misión: rescatar a un grupo de mujeres de unos bandidos con la ayuda de cinco duros convictos.

programme.title: Los siete magníficos
programme.desc: Hombres armados son contratados para proteger un pueblo mexicano de un grupo de bandidos en esta adaptación de “Seven Samurai” de Kurosawa.

programme.title: Bandidos
programme.desc: ¡Prepárate para una comedia de acción de lo más divertida con Bruce Willis, Billy Bob Thornton y Cate Blanchett! Joe (Willis) y Terry (Thornton), dos convictos, arman un plan para robar un banco… hasta que se topan con una ama de casa bastante excéntrica.

programme.title: Desapareció una noche
programme.desc: La desaparición de una niña en un peligroso vecindario de Boston, une a dos detectives privados con la policía en este fascinante misterio.

programme.title: Ojos de serpiente
programme.desc: En Atlantic City, un intento de asesinato lleva a un detective (Nicolas Cage) a investigar un caso de homicidio con 14.000 posibles sospechosos y una conspiración mortal en la que nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: Único testigo
programme.desc: Cuando una joven Amish y su hijo se encuentran envueltos en el asesinato de un agente antinarcóticos encubierto, su salvador resulta ser el duro detective de Filadelfia John Book.

programme.title: Desapareció una noche
programme.desc: La desaparición de una niña en un peligroso vecindario de Boston, une a dos detectives privados con la policía en este fascinante misterio.

programme.title: Ojos de serpiente
programme.desc: En Atlantic City, un intento de asesinato lleva a un detective (Nicolas Cage) a investigar un caso de homicidio con 14.000 posibles sospechosos y una conspiración mortal en la que nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: Vanilla Sky (ESP)
programme.desc: Joven y próspero, David puede tener todo lo que desee su corazón. Pero su vida parece estar incompleta. Una noche, David conoce a la mujer de sus sueños y cree que puede haber encontrado la pieza que le faltaba.

programme.title: El curioso caso de Benjamin Button
programme.desc: Brad Pitt y Cate Blanchett protagonizan esta adaptación de la historia de F. Scott Fitzgerald acerca de un anciano que va rejuveneciendo y los problemas que surgen cuando se enamora de una mujer.

programme.title: Aliados
programme.desc: Cuando el agente de inteligencia Max Vatan (Brad Pitt) descubre que su esposa (Marion Cotillard, ganadora del Oscar) puede conspirar con el enemigo, solo tiene 72 horas para demostrar su inocencia y salvar a su familia antes de hacer lo impensable.

programme.title: Thelma y Louise
programme.desc: En una de las mejores películas de carretera de todos los tiempos, Geena Davis y Susan Sarandon, en su paseo de la fama eterno, se convierten en dos mujeres que se embarcan en una serie de crímenes por todo el suroeste de Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Una propuesta indecorosa
programme.desc: Demi Moore y Woody Harrelson son Diana y David Murphy, una pareja corta de dinero que apuesta a un viaje corto a Las Vegas que les dé una mano de suerte. Pero las probabilidades parecen más atractivas cuando el millonario John Gage sube la apuesta.

programme.title: Ronin
programme.desc: Un equipo de agentes especiales internacionales debe llevar a cabo una misión misteriosa: robar un maletín fuertemente custodiado buscado tanto por el IRA como por la mafia rusa.

programme.title: Pisando fuerte
programme.desc: Cuando se trata de imponer la ley, un solo hombre puede marcar la diferencia. Dwayne 'la Roca' Johnson no tiene piedad al hacer imperar la justicia y aplastar la corrupción en esta historia de un hombre que decide actuar para recuperar su ciudad.

programme.title: La cacería
programme.desc: El rastreador más famoso del FBI busca a un villano que asesina personas para ser el blanco de una cacería.

programme.title: Peligro en la montaña
programme.desc: Jason Momoa protagoniza este intenso thriller de acción sobre un leñador que lucha por sobrevivir contra los traficantes de drogas que han escondido heroína en su cabaña de caza.

programme.title: Gladiador
programme.desc: Traicionado por el imperio, un general romano cae en la esclavitud y se alza como gladiador para vengar a su familia. Dirigida por Ridley Scott y protagonizada por Russell Crowe, ganó 5 premios Oscar, incluido a mejor película.

programme.title: Pisando fuerte
programme.desc: Cuando se trata de imponer la ley, un solo hombre puede marcar la diferencia. Dwayne 'la Roca' Johnson no tiene piedad al hacer imperar la justicia y aplastar la corrupción en esta historia de un hombre que decide actuar para recuperar su ciudad.

programme.title: La cacería
programme.desc: El rastreador más famoso del FBI busca a un villano que asesina personas para ser el blanco de una cacería.

programme.title: A.I. Inteligencia artificial
programme.desc: En un mundo futuro, los humanos comparten aspectos de su vida con robots de compañía llamados "Mechas". Pero cuando un prototipo de niño-robot llamado David es programado para demostrar amor incondicional..

programme.title: El núcleo
programme.desc: La Tierra deja de rotar por un cambio en la temperatura del centro del planeta. Para solucionarlo, los astronautas deberán viajar al centro, y detonar una bomba nuclear antes de que el centro se sobrecaliente y destruya toda la vida en la superficie.

programme.title: La guerra de los mundos
programme.desc: Una narrativa contemporánea del clásico H.G.Wells, esta historia de suspenso y ciencia ficción revela la extraordinaria lucha por el futuro de la humanidad a través de los ojos de una familia americana.

programme.title: De amor y monstruos
programme.desc: En un mundo lleno de monstruos, Joel (Dylan O’Brien) se entera de que su amor de la secundaria (Jessica Henwick) está a 130 kilómetros. Ahora, deberá sacar a su héroe interior y enfrentar peligros desconocidos para estar con la mujer de sus sueños.

programme.title: Yo, el halcón
programme.desc: Un título de campeón, un gran premio en metálico y el amor de su hijo: el premio más grande de todos, corren peligro cuando Hawk se enfrenta a su mayor enemigo por todo lo que siempre ha querido.

programme.title: La isla
programme.desc: Un hombre huye tras descubrir que en realidad es un “ser clonado”, y permanece junto a otros en un lugar único.

programme.title: Un funeral de murte
programme.desc: Esta estrafalaria comedia británica nos muestra con un humor negro azabache la miríada de escandalosas calamidades que asuelan a un excéntrico clan inglés, que guarda unos cuantos muertos en el armario, cuando el patriarca muere inesperadamente.

programme.title: Cuatro bodas y un funeral
programme.desc: Charles y sus amigos, todos ellos solteros y sin compromiso, han llegado a una edad en la que casi todos sus conocidos se han casado. En una de las bodas, Charles conoce a Carrie, una americana de la que se enamora a primera vista.

programme.title: Nacho Libre
programme.desc: Jack Black encarna el papel más gracioso como Ignacio, un cocinero de monasterio que alimenta huérfanos de día y por las noches se transforma en Nacho Libre, un notorio luchador en calzas.

programme.title: Algo salvaje
programme.desc: Un ejecutivo conservador accede a viajar con una mujer alocada y excéntrica, que lo embarca en una estrafalaria odisea que trastocará el mundo de ambos.

programme.title: Un funeral de murte
programme.desc: Esta estrafalaria comedia británica nos muestra con un humor negro azabache la miríada de escandalosas calamidades que asuelan a un excéntrico clan inglés, que guarda unos cuantos muertos en el armario, cuando el patriarca muere inesperadamente.

programme.title: El cuento de las comadrejas
programme.desc: Una actriz de la era dorada del cine argentino comparte una mansión en decadencia con tres hombres: su esposo, un guionista y un director con los que solía trabajar. Pero la llegada de dos jóvenes y la posible venta de la mansión lo cambian todo.

programme.title: Compadres
programme.desc: Un policía mexicano y un joven americano hacker de computadores, unen fuerzas para entregar un criminal a la justicia en esta comedia de acción llena de altas emociones y risas escandalosas.

programme.title: El crimen del padre Amaro
programme.desc: La política y las pasiones sexuales amenazan con corromper a un joven sacerdote recién ordenado en un pequeño pueblo mexicano.

programme.title: El Infierno
programme.desc: Benny es deportado de Estados Unidos a un México desgarrado por la guerra entre cárteles del narcotráfico. Se involucra en el negocio narco y asciende rápidamente, rodeado de dinero, mujeres, violencia y excesos.

programme.title: P2
programme.desc: Una mujer que es la última en salir de su oficina en la víspera de Navidad debe confiar en su ingenio para sobrevivir cuando está atrapada en un estacionamiento con un guardia de seguridad demente.

programme.title: Jessabelle
programme.desc: Una chica se enfrenta cara a cara con un espíritu que, después de mucho tiempo de tormento, ha estado buscando su regreso.

programme.title: Sabor a sangre y chocolate
programme.desc: Adaptación del relato de la autora Annette Curtis Klause acerca de una joven loba adolescente, que debe elegir entre su amor por un joven humano muy lindo y honrar la lealtad de la manada.

programme.title: San Valentín sangriento (2009)
programme.desc: Una nueva versión de la clásica película de terror de 1981 de George Mihalka, San Valentín sangriento tiene lugar diez años después de un devastador accidente en una mina de carbón con una serie de horribles asesinatos que atormentan a una pequeña ciudad.

programme.title: Drácula 2000
programme.desc: El maestro del terror Wes Craven presenta una adaptación moderna y sexy del clásico thriller gótico. Luego de que Drácula despierta de su sueño de 100 años, su primer destino es Estados Unidos y la exótica ciudad de Nueva Orleans.

programme.title: Sabor a sangre y chocolate
programme.desc: Adaptación del relato de la autora Annette Curtis Klause acerca de una joven loba adolescente, que debe elegir entre su amor por un joven humano muy lindo y honrar la lealtad de la manada.

programme.title: San Valentín sangriento (2009)
programme.desc: Una nueva versión de la clásica película de terror de 1981 de George Mihalka, San Valentín sangriento tiene lugar diez años después de un devastador accidente en una mina de carbón con una serie de horribles asesinatos que atormentan a una pequeña ciudad.

programme.title: Breakheart Pass
programme.desc: As a train races through the Rocky Mountains, the passengers are being murdered! The only hope is John Deakin (Charles Bronson) who uncovers a secret that explodes in a torrent of shocking revelations, explosive brawls, and blazing gun battles.

programme.title: The White Buffalo
programme.desc: Charles Bronson and Will Sampson star as Wild Bill Hickok and Chief Crazy Horse in this one-of-a-kind western that finds both western legends braving the snowy wilderness in search of the demon that haunts them both, the fabled White Buffalo!

programme.title: High Noon
programme.desc: Gary Cooper won the Oscar for the Best Actor in this classic tale of a lawman who stands alone to defend a town of cowardly citizens against a gang of revenge-seeking criminals.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven (1960)
programme.desc: Yul Brynner stars as one of seven gunslingers pitted against an army of marauding bandits in this rousing classic that made stars of Steve McQueen, Charles Bronson, and James Coburn. Eli Wallach also stars in this timeless tale of good versus evil.

programme.title: Shane
programme.desc: A retired gunfighter, now a drifter determined to establish a peaceful life, comes to the aid of a homestead family threatened by a land barron and his hired gun.

programme.title: The Man Who Shot Liberty Valance
programme.desc: Jimmy Stewart plays the bungling but charming big-city lawyer determined to rid the fair village of Shinbone of its number one nuisance and bad man: Liberty Valance.

programme.title: Stagecoach
programme.desc: Dallas is a woman with a past who has been driven out of town by the high-minded ladies of the community. Lucy Mallory is the wife of a cavalry officer stationed in Lordsburg, and she's determined to be with him.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: George Eastman is a poor young man determined to win a place in society and the heart of a beautiful socialite (Elizabeth Taylor). Shelley Winters plays the factory girl whose dark secret threatens Eastman’s professional and romantic prospects.

programme.title: Barefoot In The Park
programme.desc: Robert Redford is Mister Straight. Jane Fonda is his new wife. As the ecstasy of the honeymoon gives way to the reality of setting up housekeeping in a five-flight walk-up, the harmony of marriage turns to comical discord.

programme.title: Sabrina
programme.desc: Bogie and Holden are the mega-rich Larrabee brothers of Long Island. Bogie’s all work, Holden’s all playboy. But when Sabrina (Hepburn), daughter of the family’s chauffeur, returns from Paris, the stage is set for some family fireworks.

programme.title: Brief Encounter (1945)
programme.desc: Meeting a stranger in a railway station, a woman is tempted to cheat on her husband.

programme.title: The Umbrellas Of Cherbourg
programme.desc: A young woman separated from her lover by war faces a life-altering decision.

programme.title: Wuthering Heights (1939)
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier, Merle Oberon and David Niven star in this adaptation of Emily Bronte's novel. When Cathy marries the aristocratic Edgar, her first love, Heathcliff, is determined to have revenge.

programme.title: West Side Story
programme.desc: Winner of ten Academy Awards including Best Picture, this electrifying musical sets the ageless tragedy of 'Romeo and Juliet' in the slums of 1950s New York and stars Natalie Wood, Richard Beymer, Russ Tamblyn, Rita Moreno, and George Chakiris.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver is absolutely determined to have a truly old-fashioned Christmas, including decorating his own farm-grown tree. But warm weather stands in the way and, he discovers, the residents of Hooterville aren't exactly as traditional as he thought.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: In true Hooterville fashion, Oliver (Eddie Albert) discovers that the town is vehemently split as to which weather reporter they trust. As debates rage over which forecast is correct, Oliver plants his tomato crop, hoping for the best.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: After another disastrous effort from Lisa in the kitchen, Oliver implores her to take a home economics class at the local high school. Before she knows it, Lisa is a fully enrolled student...the likes of which Hooterville High has never quite seen.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When the Hooterville City Council appoints Oliver (Eddie Albert) to judge the apple competition at the annual fair, he mistakes the honor for a real judgeship and prepares for his time on the bench! But a run-in with the real law clarifies matters.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa visits Oliver's mother who is recovering from an illness. The doctor advises that she rest in a peaceful environment...and thinks that Hooterville sounds absolutely ideal! Of course, he doesn't know Hooterville, where peace is never…very close.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When Oliver (Eddie Albert) discovers that Hooterville has a still-valid contract to build war planes, he spearheads the opening of a new government defense plant. But as chaos ensues, Oliver soon wonders if the move was a big mistake after all.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa is appointed as head of Hooterville's new Human Humane committee. A perfect fit for animal-lover Lisa, and a relief from her boredom in the countryside, she soon has a menagerie of both farm and exotic animals living at Green Acres.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver takes Lisa along to an agricultural convention. There, Lisa bonds with an ex-gangster couple, who insist upon teaching the Douglas's some of their shortcuts to successful farming. It turns out to be an offer that Oliver can not refuse.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver champions agri-tech as a way to increase productivity on the farm, but when a computer gives its assessment of the Douglas' marriage, Lisa (Eva Gabor) begins to question her union with Oliver. It's bits versus bytes in Green Acres!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Determined to teach his spendthrift wife Lisa how to save money, Oliver insists that she learn about farming...by growing her own vegetables! In her own inimitable fashion, armed with useless pamphlets from Mr. Kimball, Lisa sets to tilling!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When handyman Eb (Tom Lester) reports he has seen little green men piloting flying saucers, everyone in Hooterville takes him at his word…even the Air Force…and soon the Douglas farm becomes the Roswell of the greater Pixley area!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Ralph (Mary Grace Canfield) is distraught when her beloved Mr. Kimball, is fired as the county agricultural agent. Out of a job, Kimball (Alvy Moore) no longer has money enough to marry the lady-carpenter-in-waiting! But wait…did he even want to?

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa weaves the tale of her great, great grandmother, the Queen of the Gypsies, to explain a bizarre family tradition: a woman in her family must marry an American -- but only every fourth generation -- in order to gain a special inheritance.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: After Oliver (Eddie Albert) accidentally drops a hammer on her head, Lisa (Eva Gabor) develops a case of amnesia, with no idea who she is or why she is on a farm in Hooterville…and she adamantly refuses to believe that Oliver is her husband!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Nothing gets done on the Douglas farm when Oliver (Eddie Albert) gifts Eb (Tom Lester) a top-of-the-line radio for his birthday. Letting nothing stop him, Eb (Tom Lester) enters a radio contest...even when Eleanor the cow swallows the radio whole.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa (Eva Gabor) is delighted to learn that her Hungarian mother is planning a visit to their little farm. Much to Oliver's (Eddie Albert) disbelief and dismay, a rumor spreads all around Hooterville that Lisa's mother is a European countess.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: It's a very official third season premiere for Green Acres when the retirement of a state senator leaves Hooterville considering its best candidate for the job. Of course, they turn to their beloved lawyer-come-farmer Oliver Douglas (Eddie Albert).

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver finds himself in a jam after asking Lisa to make him homemade fruit preserves. An episode deliciously devoted to Lisa's culinary escapades, Lisa musters all of her Hungarian might to make Oliver the best peach jam he's ever tasted.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: After years of substandard service, Oliver is hellbent on throwing the book at the Hooterville Phone Company. When it becomes clear that the local utility oversight board can't do much about it, he decides to handle matters directly.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Mr. Trendell, the president of the Hooterville Phone Company, hands the company over to a delighted Oliver. But after a day of crossed wires and a switchboard repairman with some loose connections of his own, Oliver is ready to call it quits.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: For the first time, Oliver has a successful crop that needs picking. His tomatoes have grown beautifully. But matters at the phone company continue to divide his precious time, so Oliver looks for an interested buyer to take the company off his hands.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Being president of the Hooterville Phone Company has been a rude awakening for Oliver. The switchboard operator is now calling him at five in the morning! After a bevy of new complaints from unhappy customers, Oliver has just about had enough.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: One might think that when Eb takes a vacation, things around the farm might go more smoothly. But when Eb elopes, leaving his cousin Walter to take his place, it turns out to be a horrible idea. Walter barely knows a weed from a hole in the ground!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa is reminded that she stored a birthday present for Oliver years ago: a genuine Stavinsky. But what is it? It's a modern art sculpture that is two parts plumbing pipes, one part tire chains, and one part birdbath. Oliver calls it The Thing.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The continually evolving story of how Lisa (Eva Gabor) and Oliver (Oliver) fell in love gets yet another version in this delightful episode. But one thing is for sure: Lisa and Oliver are just as in love today as the day when he fell out of the sky.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Green Acres is greener than ever…with jealousy. When Oliver (Eddie Albert) hires a handsome, young, intelligent Brit to take over his farm work while he is away, it doesn't take long for the newcomer to make a strong impression on Lisa (Eva Gabor).

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Mr. Haney is up to his money-making schemes again. When a government representative tells Mr. Haney that the state is looking to purchase the Douglas farm for a new highway, Mr. Haney arranges to buy back the farm from the Douglases at a steal.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Terry and Derek Johnson are two brothers at odds with each other. Terry makes good grades and has a scholarship waiting for him, but Derek has chosen to deal drugs. When a local boy dies of an overdose, Gillespie wants Derek charged with murder.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: The Sparta Police investigate a suspicious car crash and discover connections to a fraudulent development plan to build a new mall in Sparta and to the murder of Virgil Tibbs’ old friend who had invested his life savings into the deal.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Julie Lofton is a blind woman who witnesses the murder of her neighbor and quickly calls the Sparta police. As the police investigate, they discover the murder was committed to cover up an industrial crime, and now Julie's life may be in danger.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A high school student is the only witness to the brutal rape of his teacher, but his overprotective father refuses to allow him to get involved. He wants to help catch the man that assaulted his teacher, but is he brave enough to disobey his father?

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Bubba Skinner goes to Los Angeles to take custody of a suspected arsonist and bring him back to Sparta, but the arsonist disappears and is later found murdered. A pretty insurance fraud investigator helps Bubba uncover the truth behind the murder.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Vic Glendon, the ex-husband of Sparta councilperson Harriet DeLong, has been charged with murder and is facing a death sentence. Harriet's teenage son, Eugene, is most affected by the trial and the conflict he feels towards his criminal father.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A double murder at a local roadhouse is the focus of the Sparta police, and a young witness is reluctant to come forward. Now that they are parents, Althea Tibbs worries about Virgil’s safety on the police force and asks him to consider law school.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: An old flame of Gillespie’s reappears in Sparta to ask him for some professional help in assuring that her land is willed directly to her daughter, the product of the affair that she and Gillespie had twenty years ago. Stella Stevens guest stars.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Bubba gets involved when his cousin Candace and her husband Kevin are being blackmailed by Waylon Davis, the birth father of their adopted baby. Davis threatens to contest the adoption unless they cooperate, but will they give in to his demands?

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: The fun and games come to a halt when Edgar Van Buren, the wealthy host of an annual high-stakes poker party, is murdered. Gillespie and Tibbs must sift through the evidence of a case where everyone is a suspect, including the dead man’s wife.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Bubba finds himself in trouble when he is in involved in an accidental shooting while on the job. The only witness is Virgil's Aunt Ruda, whose grudge against Virgil may work against exonerating Bubba. Can anyone convince her to do what is right?

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Bubba Skinner returns to Los Angeles to tie up some unfinished business on an arson case in Sparta that’s connected to the mob in L.A. He reunites with Mike Chin, the star witness against the mob, and sparks fly once again between Bubba and Pat Day.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Cyrus Chambers and Tom Dalton are business partners in town, but when Cyrus decides he wants out of the partnership the trouble starts. Money and a secret love affair drive Tom to stop at nothing to bring Cyrus down, not even murder.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Richard Kimble takes shelter in a home for the blind when his presence in a town is discovered and his picture telecast throughout the area.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: It was one of the greatest vanishing acts in history. More than 3,000 years ago a mysterious and ruthless civilisation rose from nothing, created a brutal and unstoppable army and built an empire that rivalled Egypt and Babylon.

programme.title: Ice Age Giants

programme.title: Ice Age Giants

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In a brutal world where nature is both friend and foe, the ancient powers are just beginning. They must use all their skill and ingenuity to shape their territory and establish their cultures.

programme.title: Ancient Powers

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In a world where enemies watch for weakness, the ancient powers must use all their strength and cunning to defend their people, conquer new lands, and rise to the challenge of the battlefield.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In an unruly world, the ancient powers must lead their people, create ways to govern and keep rebellion at bay. To achieve this, they may invent caste systems, organise gladiatorial games or turn to gods.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: Though the ancient powers have endured for centuries, their destruction is close at hand. However, some will leave lasting legacies that will continue to shape the world long after their downfall.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Sarah are desperate to warn UNIT of the Kraal's invasion, but nobody will believe them.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Two Chihuahuas who fight whenever they are in the same room; a dog who attempts to prevent his owner's boyfriend from leaving the house; a dog who is obsessed with moving water.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar revisits some of his toughest cases and explores the history or misunderstood dog breeds to dispel myths about aggression.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar comes the the aid of his good friend Dr Rick Garcia, a vet who is having trouble taming a terrier with epilepsy; Cesar helps a timid Rottweiler called Tank.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A close-knit community on Moorpar in California finds itself endangered by a collection of mischievous dogs, including three huskies.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar tries to restore the peace between a Chihuahua mix and a Mastiff, and tackles an out-of-control pit bull puppy.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: When Susan MacDonald met Cobar, an Australian koolie dog, she thought it would be a match made in heaven, but she was wrong; a Shar-Pei mix is afraid of his own reflection.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A wheaten terrier mix is so attached to her owner that she won't leave his side; a shar-pei who is aggressive towards other dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An English Bulldog who is destroying her owner's house and aggressive towards their other dog; Howie Mandel's chihuahua is aggressive towards him and his wife.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A border collie/greyhound mix with an aversion to other dogs; a woman tries to tame her dog's nervousness; a large dog with too much energy.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps Casey Anderson, of "Expedition Wild," and his wife, actress Missi Pyle, with their dogs; a pit bull's fears make him aggressive.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar joins forces with Jennifer McCarthy to examine the nature of wolf-dogs, the result of the cross-breeding of wolves and domestic dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps actress Rhona Mitra curb her bulldog's violent tendencies; a newly-wed couples Chihuahua assumes dominance over their sheltie mix.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: NASA astronauts Suni Williams and Leland Melvin have worked on the International Space Station, but need Cesar's help with canine problems.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Nate Brouwer and Charnae Wright bonded through their love of dogs and the outdoors, but their feuding dogs are threatening to tear them apart.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides he needs to help his son Garry believe in Santa Claus again. So now the Dog, with a posse expanded to include his children and grandchildren, sets off on a hunt through the Colorado Rockies for Santa Claus himself!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target for today has been in trouble with the law since he was a juvenile. And he seems willing to use any trick in the system to avoid capture by Dog. In this match of wits, will Dog prevail?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A fugitive from justice is on the lam, and it's Dog's job to find him. When they hit the last known address, they discover he already has pulled up stakes and left no forwarding address. The posse's one hope is to locate his girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: There is a running joke in the posse that every time Bobby Brown asks them for help with a fugitive, he always promises them that it's "an easy one," but the hunts end up being epic searches.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog believes in safety first, and today's hunt puts this philosophy to the test. The fugitive's problem with anger management increases the dangers of their already risky line of work. Dog warns the crew to be ready for anything as they head out.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today, Dog's bounty is about to take him on a trip down memory lane and test his investigative chops. With each lead propelling him closer and closer to his childhood haunts, Dog uses old-fashioned detective skills to track his prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is a big-hearted guy. He's helping Mary Ellen, his friend and fellow bondsman, on a dangerous night hunt for a fugitive she is now regretting bailing out. He's also giving his nephew Justin a second chance to rejoin the team.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Things are seldom what they seem in the world of bounty hunting. When the fugitive's girlfriend offers to help Dog trap this dangerous felon, Dog knows that someone is being deceived, the only question is whom?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that looks can be deceiving. The fugitive is pretty, petite, and trouble. She stands accused of settling an argument with the help of a box cutter. What Dog does not anticipate is how deceptive this femme fatale can truly be!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What do you do when you have a fugitive you not only want to find, but believe can be helped back onto the straight and narrow? If you're Mary Ellen, you call your good friend Dog.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Duty calls and the Chapmans are off on a hunt. The team chases a fugitive who has disappeared into a world of "no known" addresses.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Beth returns to the compound on the Big Island, she finds a damaged SUV and two possible culprits--Dog or Justin. Pressed by Beth, Dog offers a third option. The perpetrators are Hawaii's mythical mischief makers--the Menehune!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been quite a while since Tim Chapman put down his mace can and bulletproof vest to care for his growing family. When his old friend Dog calls asking for help tracking an elusive felon, Tim jumps into action.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With the aid of the runner's girlfriend, the posse heads out to bring a client with a checkered past in. Little does the team suspect that before the end of the day, Dog will be helping to mend a family torn apart by violence.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog tracks a fugitive who is on the run from the law for the first time. Reading the file Dog knows the young man's life is at the crossroads. Will he be able to track down this wanna-be-gansta in time to convince him to make the right choice?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For a guy who started life as a free spirited outlaw-biker, Dog has certainly turned into a family man. His children touch everything he does today, from searching for the perfect gift for his daughter Cecily's birthday to hunting a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The hunt for an elusive and clever criminal takes Dog through the world of a bantam fighting cock, a pregnant daughter, and a jungle safe house go together. And don't forget the mopeds as well as a group of hostile squatters on government land!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What's a father to do? When the cops ask Dog for help tracking down a renegade teen with a history of running hard, Baby Lyssa, eight months pregnant and counting, insists on joins the hunt. Can Dog keep his daughter safe and catch his man?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For Dog and Beth, it's not only another day in paradise, it's their anniversary. Beth is hoping for a romantic dinner with her man, but she knows only too well that for Dog work always comes first.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today Dog finds himself looking for more than one fugitive. He starts the day looking for a woman who has skipped out on her court date. But he soon learns that she has teamed up with a woman whose criminal exploits have attracted the local media.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog gave a break to a young man with a drug problem who promised to enter drug rehab. But this commitment to rehabilitation seems to have ended when he bolted from the car on the way to the drug treatment center and went on the run.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Interpreting Alexis' vendetta against Blake as a love/hate relationship, Dex tells Alexis he is through being taken for granted by her; Sammy suspects Virginia may not be as naive as she wants people to think.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle agrees to have her operation, but only after Blake signs her divorce papers and living will, to be enacted if the surgery is not a success; Fallon is haunted by recurring dreams of Roger Grimes.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle's operation is unsuccessful and she slips into a coma. Told she will probably never recover, a grieving Blake returns to Denver; Sammy Jo is attacked by an unknown assailant; Dex discovers Joanna is a link to Alexis' controller, Heath.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Fearing that his darkest secret will be revealed because of the search for Roger Grimes's murderer, Blake vows to take the rap to put an end to the investigation; Dex and Sable both go after Heath.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sammy Jo recognizes Gibson as the man Krystle saw in her nightmares, and Blake vows to protect his family secret with his life; Adam discovers Virginia's secret past; Blake entrusts Dex with documents relating to their family's secret.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis hires a mercenary to get her ships back; Adam and Jeff exchange blows after he accuses Adam of being disloyal to Blake; Dex begins to doubt Alexis can ever offer him the kind of love he needs.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sable tries to convince Blake she is on his side. Dex is attracted by her loyalty; Sammy Jo's interest in Tanner McBride intensifies; Dex attacks Adam after learning he took advantage of Virginia; Joanna becomes jealous of Sable's interest in Dex.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sable persuades Heath not to kill her. Upset by her close encounter with death, she goes to Dex for comfort; Alexis goes to Paris to keep an eye on Boyd's commando operation to retrieve her oil tankers.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake resumes control of Denver-Carrington and fires Adam; Joanna accepts Adam's offer to work for him and Alexis; Zorelli confesses his love to Fallon, but she remains confused by her feelings toward him.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis gets her revenge on Sable when she tells her tankers have sunk; Alexis is devastated when she discovers Dex slept with Sable; as Sammy Jo becomes increasingly fond of Tanner McBride, she is unaware that he is married.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis is emotionally crushed by Dex's affair with Sable; Blake tells Dex and Sable beneath the lake is a Nazi treasure and his father killed Grimes to prevent him from exploiting it; Adam tries to win back Blake's trust so he can spy for Alexis.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sable unleashes her lawsuit against Alexis; Dex dives into the hidden vault beneath the lake and finds it empty; Zorelli tracks down the uncle of Dominique Devereaux, learning he knows something about Grimes' murder; Alexis leaves for Switzerland.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake is a suspect in Elsworth Chisolm's apparent murder; Zorelli is put back on the Grimes case; Charles Matthews warns Blake that Zorelli has been asking him questions about Blake's father.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Jeff and Dex meet with Roger Grimes' wife and learn he has a son; Sable is pregnant and unable to tell Dex that he is the father; Adam has a picture of Jeff and Monica retouched to appear incestuous and then submits it to a sleazy tabloid.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Harvesting Murder

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Roasts and Ghosts

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Stage Fright
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, the team heads to Rapids Theater in Niagara Falls, New York where a lonely actress hanged herself backstage. The staff believes her spirit has never left and is haunting the theater.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Murdered Matron
programme.desc: Special guest investigator Meredith Vieira joins the TAPS team, as they investigate Sailors' Snug Harbor in Staten Island, New York. Once a retirement home to weathered seaman, it's now home to the spirit of a murdered matron.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: The Bloodiest 47 Acres
programme.desc: TAPS is called out to Jefferson City, Missouri, to investigate the notorious Missouri State Penitentiary. A prison that was once named one of the most violent prisons in America.Riots, stabbings and executions left thousands dead over the years.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Voices of Pain
programme.desc: On this episode TAPS heads back to the fan favorite; Waverly Hills Sanatorium in Louisville, Kentucky, an abandoned tuberculosis hospital haunted by its former patients and staff.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Distillery of Spirits

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Membership Denied

programme.desc: Harumi has outed Mystake as the ‘Fake Harumi’. Mystake reveals her true Oni form and battles Garmadon, allowing Skylor to absorb some of his power and escape. In the Realm of Oni and Dragon, the Ninja return to rescue Faith, only to discover it’s a trap.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Garmadon is enraged by the loss of Harumi and releases his wrath by ordering the Oni Titan to turn Ninjago City to ash. Lloyd fears they won’t be able to endure much longer – where are his friends?

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Atop their dragons, the Ninja return to Ninjago City amidst Garmadon’s vicious attack. Master Wu and the Ninja join up with Lloyd, Nya, and Dareth and they celebrate their reunion.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The four Ninja are snapped out of their post-hero complacency when Lord Garmadon’s son Lloyd shows up and tries to pick up where his father left off. The Ninja dismiss him as a threat, but regret that choice after Lloyd wakes up the evil snake tribe.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Back in training mode with the looming threat of Lloyd and the Hypnobrai, Zane wanders after a Falcon and lands himself in a heap of trouble. The rest of the Ninja leave the training dojo to help him and return to find that the snakes have burned it …

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Lloyd, having been kicked out of the Hynobrai snake tribe unlocks a second tribe – The Fangpyres – to help him regain control.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After the Fangpyres join forces with the Hypnobrai, Lloyd awakens Pythor – the last remaining snake of the Anacondrai tribe.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Lloyd moves in and tries to make nice by helping out with chores, but he just gets in the way. Pythor has awoken the Vipoids and the Constrictaurs and an all out snake war has taken over Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Pythor declares himself to be the destined leader who will reawaken The Great Devourer – an ancient beast who can’t be killed and will consume all of Ninjago. We find out Nya is the Samurai and Lloyd is taken prisoner by the snake tribes.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: Things have started to go missing at our heroes' outpost. It turns out that The Legend Beast Raven has been stealing Golden CHI for a tribe of menacing Scorpions.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: The Scorpions and Spiders have set up a tricky trap, and the heroes must free the Legend Beast Eagle and the Bear in a daring mission. Lavertus helps out, using his helicopter. But the Scorpions and Spiders have new vehicles of their own … Speedorz!

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: Worriz and Cragger go off on a mission of their own, but get captured by the Spiders. Now it is up to the rest of the heroes to go on one last daring rescue mission.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The dream chasers feel like they should be taking the fight to the Never Witch instead of training for R.E.M. trials. Zoey's haunted by her most painful memories and Mateo continues to only dream craft Z-Blob-related items.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Set in the past, the dream chaser duo Hannah and Beau argue while young Oz searches for Lunia.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Zoey tries to rebuild a relationship with her estranged dad and Logan steps up his training to beat Astrid.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: A close call with the Never Witch places Mateo in the forests of Wildoria while Beau is on an adventure in the dream world with Zoey.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Zoey and Mateo are trapped in the Grim Realm while Izzie is suspicious of MadTeo's true identity.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: An attack by the Never Witch draws the dream chasers to the Dunes of Duralumina, leaving Nova and Sneak to handle an incursion on their own.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Police Chief Wheeler announces the formation of the 700 million dollar Sky Police. Police captain, Tom Bennett, gets a call that his wife has gone into labor early.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Fendrich and Sinclair compete to win the City's tallest building contest. An off-screen narrator narrates a day in the life of a helpful handyman, Harl Hubbs.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Mayor Fleck is running for re-election against R E Fendrich who will stop at nothing to win to use his new power to defeat Sinclair once and for all. When Duke loses his memory, Snake Rattler tricks him into believing he's Snake's criminal henchman.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: A young park guest accidentally strands himself in the Pteranodon aviary, requiring Owen and a testy Stygimoloch to stage a daring rescue.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Rock star mathematician Ian Malcolm returns to Isla Nublar and helps Claire, Owen, and Hudson deal with strange power surges all over Jurassic World.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: A Dilophosaurus runs loose in the park's hotel, and Owen and Claire must find it before the guests notice ... and before Vic's dino-hunting security team can damage the hotel and the guests!

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: The Final Game
programme.desc: Arin learns a devastating secret about the Merge and confronts Lloyd as Cole stays behind to protect the dragon horns. Sora faces off against Nokt, and Wyldfyre is too late to stop the manipulation of the games.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: Elements of Betrayal
programme.desc: Arin, Zane, and Cole make a shocking discovery in the Monastery of Gates as they defend the Dragon Horns; the depowered Elemental Masters clash with the Wolf Mask army.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: The Ninja follow a clue to Arin's location but find a new threat, while Nya, Kai and Wyldfyre spark old grudges in their search for Jay.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Ninjago has become a bleak, enemy-occupied city ruled by Emperor Garmadon and his Sons of Garmadon biker gang.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay, Kai and Zane are interrogated by Iron Baron, the ruthless warlord to the Dragon Hunters. Feeling threatened, the Ninja choose to keep their identities secret.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: As the Ninja are put into a cage aboard a hunting party, they learn that their elemental powers will be used to help lure a dragon. Undercover, Cole learns Iron Baron is in search for Firstbourne’s nest – the Mother of All Dragons.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La familia va a Washington a pedir la mano de Ivanka con un resultado inesperado, mientras que Johnny busca deshacer la relación enfermiza entre el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se muda a un lujoso departamento y se dedica a buscar a un nuevo roommate, mientras que El Abuelo y Jonathan se pelean por quedarse con el cuarto una vez que el Noruego dejo el departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se involucra sentimentalmente con la nueva roommate del Noruego, la cual esconde un oscuro secreto, mientras tanto Peluzín y Jony buscan lanzar a Olaf al estrellato.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está despilfarrando su fortuna peor que nunca, mientras que Pitipú, Don Sebas y Gaspar buscan solucionar el problema de plomería del edificio Pino.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego todavía no puede asimilar que perdió toda su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo malaconseja a Peluzín de cómo pagar la renta atrasada de su departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Irma organiza un club de peleas clandestinas, mientras que Pitipú decepcionado de sus conocimientos Bíblicos, decide embarcarse en el camino del mal.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú busca ayudar a Don Sebas con su problema de peso, mientras que Peluzín y el Noruego buscan aprovecharse de un afamado cantante del edificio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El colegio organiza un viaje todo pagado a Acapulco para reforzar la relación "Padres e Hijos", y todos buscan colarse a esa vacación, así tengan hijos o no. Al final la vacación no resulta como esperaban.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego descubre por accidente que cuenta con poderes mentales y decide aprovecharlos para su conveniencia, mientras que el Diablo sube del inframundo para buscar un nuevo asistente en Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está cansado de la mala racha que ha tenido con las mujeres y busca el consejo de Pitipú, mientras que Peluzín le pide ayuda a Jonathan para poder encontrar a su verdadero padre.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Mientras que el Abuelo está vuelto loco por encontrar su revista favorita, Peluzín desentierra la verdad sobre su verdadera familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín trata de averiguar el paradero de su madre con la ayuda de sus dos nuevos papás, mientras que Gaspar invita al Abuelo, el Noruego y Johnny a el nuevo restaurante de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y Peluzín buscan lucran aprovechando el próximo paro de agua en la ciudad, mientras que el Noruego nos revela por fin después de tanto tiempo el porque de su miedo al baño.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los Lambreton son los encargados de organizar la fiesta navideña de este año en su casa, mientras que Don Sebas extraña a su país natal y piensa en regresar.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives link the murders of two male teens to a case that occurred five years earlier; McCoy fears he convicted the wrong man for the earlier murders.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A subway-station bombing prompts the squad to seek help from detectives in Baltimore where their prime suspect is wanted.

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Michael Dobson, a sleazy nightclub owner, crosses the detectives' path again when his second wife is killed.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis' investigation of the murders of a mother and son leads to the father, but Kincaid uncovers the real killer.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The investigation of a gay man's murder leads the detectives to his former employer who sexually harassed him.

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A father and daughter running a prostitution ring become prime suspects when Briscoe and Curtis investigate the death of a college student.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Multiple murders lead detectives to a homeless schizophrenic who has been off medication for some time.

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy and his new partner, D.A. Jamie Ross, handle a difficult case involving a carjacking and murder.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives investigate a case involving a woman who was killed for her identity by her own sister.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A young woman of Italian descent changes her story when her fingerprints turn up at the apartment of a murdered black college student.
